SELECT student_name ent_name, gpa, school_lunch
FROM students s
LIMIT 5;

SELECT COUNT(*) --student_name ent_name, gpa, school_lunch
FROM students s 
WHERE s.school_lunch = "Yes" AND gpa > 3.3
ORDER BY gpa DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT gpa
FROM students 
ORDER BY gpa DESC;


SELECT grade_level, AVG(gpa)
FROM students s 
GROUP BY grade_level
ORDER BY grade_level;

SELECT grade_level, AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa
FROM students s 
GROUP BY grade_level
HAVING avg_gpa < 3.3
ORDER BY grade_level;


SELECT *
FROM students;

SELECT *
FROM student_grades;


SELECT students.id, students.student_name,
	   student_grades.class_name, student_grades.final_grade 
FROM students LEFT JOIN student_grades
	ON students.id = student_grades.student_id ;
